pipeline_stages.PRE_PROCESSING: Initial intake and basic validation of roster files before detailed processing.
pipeline_stages.MAPPING_APPROVAL: Business and mapping rule approval step prior to transformation.
pipeline_stages.ISF_GEN: Intermediate staging file generation, often the heaviest transformation step.
pipeline_stages.DART_GEN: Creation of downstream-ready artifacts (e.g., DART files) for partner systems.
pipeline_stages.DART_REVIEW: Manual or automated review of generated DART files before validation.
pipeline_stages.DART_UI_VALIDATION: UI-driven validation of DART output to catch structural and business-rule issues.
pipeline_stages.SPS_LOAD: Final load into downstream systems such as SPS, after all upstream validations pass.

metrics.market_success_rate: File-level success rate: percentage of roster files that completed processing successfully in a given market.
metrics.record_success_rate: Record-level success rate: percentage of individual records across roster files that processed successfully.
metrics.failure_rate: Percentage of failed units (files or records) out of all processed units for the given scope.
metrics.delay_factor: Ratio of the observed stage duration to the historical or expected average duration for that stage.
